top_entities.name: El Salvador
top_entities.news_summary: CRISTOSAL SHUTDOWN + CONSTITUTIONAL AMENDMENT (ongoing Jul 5): Cristosal — El Salvador's leading human rights organization — suspended operations citing "escalating repression"; Ruth López remains imprisoned. Legislative Assembly amended constitution allowing indefinite presidential re-election. Foreign Agents Law (May 2026): 140+ rights defenders/journalists fled; 3+ organizations shut down including APES. 86+ political prisoners; 245+ facing persecution. State of exception Year 5. Life sentences for persons as young as 12. Downgrade proposal (20.3 to 15.0) REMAINS PENDING — not yet applied. NBC News: political exiles say "history is repeating itself."

top_entities.name: Palestine
top_entities.news_summary: CEASEFIRE VIOLATIONS ONGOING (Jul 5): Israel killed 3 Palestinians in Gaza Jul 1 despite ceasefire. Al Jazeera documents 3,465 Israeli violations of ceasefire since Oct 10, 2025; 1,053 Palestinians killed since truce. Aid blockage continues: only 36% of allocated trucks entered Gaza (55,539 of 156,000 Oct-Jun). Israel controls ~64% of Gaza territory. 72,945+ Palestinians killed since Oct 2023. top_entities.name: Nigeria
top_entities.news_summary: LEAN SEASON PEAK — 35M+ FOOD INSECURE (continuing Jul 5): 35M acutely food insecure nationally — worst in a decade. 15,000+ at IPC Phase 5 Catastrophe in Borno. 3M children under five facing life-threatening severe acute malnutrition. ~5.5M without lifesaving food aid (WFP can reach only 740,000 of 6.2M in need). 150 WFP nutrition clinics in Borno/Yobe shut down — 300,000 children at risk of wasting. Communities reporting people joining armed groups for food. WFP needs $129M by July. FAO: West Africa 52.8M facing acute food insecurity June-August.

top_entities.name: China
top_entities.news_summary: ETHNIC UNITY LAW IN FORCE (Jul 1) — TRANSNATIONAL REPRESSION CONFIRMED: Law enacted July 1; senior officials confirmed extraterritorial applicability at Jun 24 State Council press conference — overseas individuals and organizations can be held liable. Al Jazeera Jul 2: "law extends its legal reach overseas." Al Jazeera Jul 3: Inside Story on forced assimilation. Taiwan government issued formal response amid fears of cross-border repression. Amnesty: "legal blueprint for cultural erasure" for Uyghurs, Tibetans, Mongolians. Germany Foreign Ministry: "great concern." European Parliament April 30 resolution condemning law.

top_entities.name: Lebanon
top_entities.news_summary: IDF STRIKES — "NO CEASEFIRE" IN SOUTH (Jul 5 continuing): IDF struck ~10 Hezbollah sites in southern Lebanon in early July (Bint Jbeil, Beit Yahoun, Kounine, Baraashit). Lebanese President Aoun condemned "continuing violations." Multiple killed and wounded daily despite the April 16 US-brokered truce framework. 4,000+ killed since March 2 resumption; 1M+ displaced (>20% of population). 76% of south Lebanon farmers displaced; 22% of agricultural land damaged. 1M+ facing food insecurity. Lebanese military documented violations in Khiam, Bint Jbeil, Dibbin.

top_entities.name: Venezuela

top_entities.name: Ukraine

top_entities.name: Mali

top_entities.name: South Sudan

entity_reviews.summary: FAMINE RISK — BURHAKABA PHASE 5 (ongoing): 6.5M (1 in 4 Somalis) at IPC Phase 3+; 2M at emergency. Burhakaba District at IPC AMN Phase 5.
